scope: Cycle 29: Talent tree scene fix + wire 9 special rules into gameplay

bugs_found.description: ArbreDeVie.tscn was a 12-line stub — no child nodes. arbre_de_vie_ui.gd used 10 @onready vars ($ParchmentBG, $MainMargin/RootVBox/...) that all resolved null. Scene crashed on load. Hub hotspot 'arbre' was a dead button.

9 talent special rules (survive_death_once, resist_damage_once, passive_heal, reduce_rep_loss, rep_gain_multiplier, heal_multiplier, harmony_anam_bonus, crit_success_heal, extra_card_option) were defined in TALENT_NODES and unlockable via Anam, but NEVER checked by gameplay code. Players spent Anam on talents that did nothing.

remaining_known_issues.description: 3 talent special rules still unwired: predict_next_theme, see_next_card_full, sacrifice_life_for_anam. These require HUD UI additions to display the prediction or sacrifice prompt.

overall_assessment: ArbreDeVie ghost feature fixed + 9 talent rules wired. 13 of 16 talent special rules now have real gameplay impact. 38 total bugs fixed across 29 cycles.
